section.title: KTN::CME::IL3::AppMessageGen Class Reference

para.para: This class is used to generate CME IL3 application messages and provide pre-filled templates for them.

listitem.para: static KTNBuf MsgTemplate (const string &settingsfile, bool isMkt, bool isManual)
static void UpdateMsgPrice (char *&buf, uint32_t newSeqNum, uint64_t price)
static KTNBuf NewOrderTemplate (const string &settingsfile, bool isMkt, bool isManual)

static KTNBuf ModifyOrderTemplate (const string &settingsfile, bool isMkt, bool isManual)
static OrderCancelReplaceRequestMsg * ModOrderMsgAutoTemplate (const string &settingsfile, bool isMkt, bool isManual)
static KTNBuf CancelOrderTemplate (const string &settingsfile, bool isManual)
static KTNBuf PartyDetailsDefEncode (const CmeSessionSettings &sess, uint32_t seqnum)
static KTNBuf MassActionEncode (const CmeSessionSettings &sess, const EnumMassActionScope scope, int id, uint64_t ordreqid, uint32_t seqnum)

section.title: Detailed Description
section.para: This class is used to generate CME IL3 application messages and provide pre-filled templates for them.
